Back to a readable, stable selection.

### Fixed
- Reverted the over-aggressive subtle tree selection from v1.0.9 (it removed the sidebar highlight and washed the text out). The **playlist sidebar** is back to the normal accent selection — visible highlight + readable text. Only the **main navigation tree** stays subtle (its FlatMonkey original), and no icon is force-filled, so nothing squares.

### Important — clear the skin cache
MediaMonkey caches compiled skins. Delete `%APPDATA%\MediaMonkey5\precompiledLess_Flat Monkey Dark_Desktop.css`, then restart MediaMonkey.
